name: jura-wolpertinger
description: Lokale Electron-App zum Schreiben, Abgeben, Exportieren und Korrigieren juristischer Prüfungen.

scripts.dist: pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:dir: pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run build && electron-builder --dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.release:linux: pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run build && electron-builder --linux --publish always
scripts.release:mac: pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.release:win: pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run build && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.test:e2e: electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && pnpm run build && playwright test
